projects.title: Student Placement Predictor
projects.description: Build an ML model that predicts student placement probability using real college data. Train Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and evaluate with confusion matrix.

projects.title: Resume Screening System
projects.description: NLP-based system that automatically screens resumes and ranks candidates by job relevance using TF-IDF and cosine similarity.

projects.title: Fake News Detector
projects.description: Binary text classification using BERT or Logistic Regression on the LIAR dataset. Deploy as a REST API.

projects.title: Crop Yield Prediction
projects.description: Predict crop yield using weather and soil data. A great project for showcasing regression and feature engineering skills.

projects.title: Customer Churn Predictor
projects.description: Predict which telecom customers will churn using classification models. Include SHAP values for explainability.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Build a responsive portfolio with your resume, projects, skills, and contact info. Deploy on GitHub Pages or Netlify for free.

projects.title: Student Result Management System
projects.description: Full-stack CRUD app to manage student marks, generate grade reports, and export PDFs. Great LinkedIn project.

projects.title: Job Portal Clone
projects.description: Build a mini LinkedIn/Naukri clone with job listings, resume upload, and search. Cover authentication, role-based access, and REST APIs.

projects.title: E-commerce Product Dashboard
projects.description: Build a product management dashboard with charts, inventory tracking, and sales analytics.

projects.title: COVID-19 Data Analysis
projects.description: Analyze global COVID-19 data to uncover trends in case fatality rates, vaccination progress, and country comparisons using pandas and Plotly.
